section_order: Nav > Hero > Logo Bar > Features > How It Works > Testimonials > Pricing > FAQ > CTA Footer
cta_placement: Above fold + after pricing + sticky nav CTA
color_strategy: Primary blue hero. White features section. Light gray pricing. Dark CTA footer.
effects: Fade-up on scroll. Counter animations on stats. Glassmorphism feature cards.
conversion_tips: Lead with outcome not feature in headline. Add logo bar of recognizable clients early. Price anchor high then show value.

section_order: Nav > Hero Image Carousel > Trust Bar > Product Grid > Social Proof > Category Browse > Email Capture > Footer
cta_placement: Sticky Add to Cart + after social proof
color_strategy: White background. Product photography drives color. Brand accent for CTA.
effects: Product image zoom on hover. Smooth cart slide-in. Quick view modal.
conversion_tips: Show stock scarcity only when real. Put reviews directly below product not below fold. Free shipping threshold nudges AOV.

section_order: Headline > Sub-headline > Hero Image > 3 Benefits > Form > Testimonials > FAQ > Second CTA
color_strategy: Single accent color for CTA. Everything else neutral to focus attention.
effects: Minimal animation — forms need focus not distraction. Confetti on submit.
conversion_tips: One goal one CTA. Remove nav to eliminate exit paths. Show form fields count upfront. Social proof near form not at bottom.

section_order: Nav > Problem Agitation > Solution Hero > Features > ROI Calculator > Case Studies > Integration Logos > Pricing > Book Demo CTA
cta_placement: After problem. After case study. Sticky demo CTA.
color_strategy: Navy or dark trust hero. White content sections. Teal or green for ROI numbers.
effects: Smooth scroll. Animated ROI calculator. Case study expand cards.
conversion_tips: Lead with pain not product. Show company logos (social proof) before features. ROI calculator increases intent before pricing.

section_order: Nav > Full-screen Name Hero > Selected Work Grid > About > Process > Testimonials > Contact
cta_placement: Work thumbnails with hover CTA. Contact form at bottom.
color_strategy: Black or dark neutral hero. White work sections. One bold accent.
effects: Cursor follower. Image reveal on scroll. Smooth page transitions.
conversion_tips: Curate ruthlessly — show 6 great pieces not 20 average ones. Process section builds trust. Show client names when possible.

section_order: Nav > Hero Food Video > Reservations CTA > Menu Preview > Story / About > Gallery > Reviews > Location + Hours
cta_placement: Reservation button pinned top + hero CTA + after gallery
color_strategy: Warm food colors from photography. Dark background sections for atmosphere.
effects: Food photography parallax. Smooth menu tabs. Map embed.
conversion_tips: Real food photography converts better than stock. Reservation CTA must be one click. Show hours prominently — basic but often missing.

section_order: Nav > Phone Mockup Hero > App Store Buttons > Feature Highlights > Social Proof Screenshots > Pricing > App Store CTAs
cta_placement: App store buttons in hero + after features + footer
color_strategy: App brand colors. Clean white sections. High contrast CTAs.
effects: App mockup device animation. Feature screenshot scroll carousel. Rating stars animation.
conversion_tips: Show actual app screenshots not generic mockups. Rating count builds trust. Testimonials from real reviews not made-up.

section_order: Nav > Impact Statement Hero > Donation Form / CTA > Story / Problem > Impact Numbers > Donor Social Proof > FAQ > Recurring Donation CTA
cta_placement: Donation form above fold + after impact story
color_strategy: Warm empathetic colors. Not corporate blue. Earthy greens or warm oranges.
effects: Emotional photo storytelling. Animated impact counters.
conversion_tips: Lead with specific human story not statistics. Show exactly where money goes. Recurring donation upsell after one-time gift. Progress bar to goal.

section_order: Nav > Hero with Date + Location > Registration CTA > Speaker Lineup > Agenda Preview > Venue + Travel > Sponsors > FAQ > Ticket CTA
cta_placement: Registration CTA immediately after hero + after agenda + sticky
color_strategy: Bold event brand colors. Dark sections for agenda. Light sections for speakers.
effects: Countdown timer. Speaker hover cards. Schedule accordion.
conversion_tips: Countdown creates urgency. Speaker photos build credibility. Early bird pricing if applicable. Make location/travel easy to find.

section_order: Nav > Bold Problem Statement Hero > Trusted By Logos > Services > Process > Case Studies > Team > CTA / Discovery Call
cta_placement: Discovery call CTA after logos + after case studies + footer
color_strategy: Dark navy trust hero. White service sections. Accent for CTA buttons.
effects: Hover case study reveals. Team card flip. Smooth section transitions.
conversion_tips: Lead with specific industry outcome. Show logos before services. Make case studies the longest section. Discovery call reduces friction vs contact form.

section_order: Nav > Plan Comparison Table > Toggle Monthly/Annual > Feature Checklist > FAQ > Enterprise CTA > Testimonials
cta_placement: Start trial on each plan + enterprise contact + page-bottom CTA
color_strategy: White background. Highlight recommended plan with primary color. Green for included features.
effects: Annual/monthly toggle animation. Tooltip feature explanations. Highlight plan on hover.
conversion_tips: Anchor with highest plan first. Highlight middle/recommended. Show savings on annual. Feature checklist builds perceived value. FAQ reduces churn triggers.

section_order: Minimal Nav > Bold Coming Soon Hero > Value Proposition > Email Capture Form > Social Proof / Early Adopter Count > Share Incentive
cta_placement: Email form as primary CTA — above fold and only CTA
color_strategy: Dark or bold brand color hero. Minimal white content below.
effects: Subtle particle or gradient animation. Counter of signups.
conversion_tips: One goal: capture email. Show signup count as social proof. Incentivize sharing. Don't over-explain unbuilt product.
